usefulness_evaluation.narrative: All 7 booking artifacts ingested successfully with correct types and parsed fields. All 7 ExtractBookingField queries returned specific, accurate answers matching the raw artifact text. The negative test correctly identified irrelevant questions without hallucinating. Multi-hostel disambiguation (Hanoi-specific check-in time) worked perfectly. Booking field extraction is production-quality.

flight_terminal_departure.question: What terminal and what time does my outbound flight depart?
flight_terminal_departure.answer: Your outbound flight, DL 472, departs from New York (JFK) Terminal 4 at 6:45 PM EDT.

hotel_cancellation.question: What is the cancellation policy?
hotel_cancellation.answer: You can cancel for free until June 12, 2026, at 11:59 PM CEST. If you cancel after this date, the first night's charge (EUR 289.00) will apply. In case of a no-show, the full stay will be charged.

activity_meeting_point.question: What is the meeting point and what should I bring?
activity_meeting_point.answer: The meeting point is at the Nativity Facade entrance (Carrer de la Marina side), specifically at C/ de la Marina, 253, 08013 Barcelona. You should look for the guide holding an orange Barcelona Expert Tours sign and arrive 15 minutes early. What to bring: Valid photo ID, Comfortable walking shoes, Sunscreen and water bottle, This confirmation, Shoulders and knees must be covered.
activity_meeting_point.expected_location: Nativity Facade entrance, C/ de la Marina, 253

car_rental_insurance_fuel.question: What insurance is included and what is the fuel policy?
car_rental_insurance_fuel.answer: The insurance included is Super CDW (zero excess) and Theft Protection. The fuel policy is Full-to-Full.

hostel_hanoi_checkin.question: What time is check-in at the Hanoi hostel?
hostel_hanoi_checkin.answer: Check-in at the Hanoi Old Quarter Hostel is between 2:00 PM and 10:00 PM.

ryokan_meals_dinner.question: What meals are included and what time is dinner?
ryokan_meals_dinner.answer: The meal plan includes Kaiseki Dinner and Traditional Japanese Breakfast. Dinner is served in-room at 6:00 PM or 6:30 PM, with guests needing to confirm their preference at check-in.

tour_tastings_dietary.question: How many food tastings are included and what dietary accommodations are available?
tour_tastings_dietary.answer: The tour includes 12 tastings across 3 markets and 4 street food stands. Dietary accommodations available with advance notice include vegetarian, gluten-free, and vegan substitutions for most stops.

negative_test.question: What is the hotel wifi password?
negative_test.answer: The provided text is a flight booking confirmation and does not contain any information about a hotel or its Wi-Fi password.
